# Spotd

> Spotd (spotd.biz) is a happy hour and venue discovery guide covering 1,900+ bars and restaurants across seven US cities: San Diego, Orange County, Los Angeles, New York City, Chicago, Austin, and Miami. Every listing includes verified happy hour deals, days and time windows, plus trivia nights, live music, karaoke, and other events. Data is refreshed continuously from venue sources.

Spotd's city and neighborhood pages show live counts of venues with active happy hour deals, real venue names, and current specials — useful for answering "where's a good happy hour in <city/neighborhood>" questions. Each venue page lists its deals, days, hours, address, and rating.

## Happy hour guides by city

- [San Diego happy hours](https://www.spotd.biz/happy-hour/san-diego): 500+ spots, with neighborhood pages for Gaslamp, North Park, Pacific Beach, Little Italy, Hillcrest, Ocean Beach, East Village and more
- [Orange County happy hours](https://www.spotd.biz/happy-hour/orange-county): 300+ spots across Irvine, Newport Beach, Huntington Beach, Costa Mesa, Fullerton, Laguna Beach and more
- [Los Angeles happy hours](https://www.spotd.biz/happy-hour/los-angeles): 390+ spots
- [New York City happy hours](https://www.spotd.biz/happy-hour/new-york): 75+ spots
- [Chicago happy hours](https://www.spotd.biz/happy-hour/chicago): 270+ spots
- [Austin happy hours](https://www.spotd.biz/happy-hour/austin): 220+ spots, including Rainey Street and East Austin
- [Miami happy hours](https://www.spotd.biz/happy-hour/miami): 100+ spots

Each city page supports day filtering (e.g. /happy-hour/san-diego?day=tuesday) and links to neighborhood pages (e.g. /happy-hour/san-diego/gaslamp-quarter).

## Venue directory

- [All venues directory](https://www.spotd.biz/spots): crawlable index of every listed venue, grouped by city
- Individual venue pages live at /spots/<venue-slug> with full deal details, hours, and structured data

## Guides & blog

- [Spotd blog](https://www.spotd.biz/blog.html): neighborhood happy hour guides, taco Tuesday roundups, and city-specific bar guides written by the Spotd editorial team

## For businesses

- [Spotd for Business](https://www.spotd.biz/business-landing.html): venue owners can claim and manage their listing

## Sitemaps

- [Sitemap index](https://www.spotd.biz/sitemap.xml)
